Custom & special orders — Additional laminate or paint-matched programs may be available; custom colors typically require 8–12 week lead time.

Digital representation may vary from actual product. Confirm premium melamine selections against Sherwin-Williams color samples where applicable, and textured woodgrain with our team, before ordering.
